title: transport.rs: recv_text_frame skips binary/other frames indefinitely, not just ping/pong
description: recv_text_frame (transport.rs line 621) has arms for Ping and Pong (continue), and a catch-all Other branch that bails with an error. The comment says 'skipping ping/pong frames' but the loop never terminates on an unexpected binary frame without waiting for the timeout (30s) — the bail\! arm returns an error immediately on 'other' frames, so it does terminate. Actually this is fine. The real concern: the function has a 30-second timeout that applies to the entire wait including pings, but a server sending only Ping frames (no Text) will cause the function to loop until timeout with no log. A single log line at WARN level when the ping loop count exceeds a small threshold would make debugging easier. Low impact — file as elegance.
